liteminer.configuration.title: Liteminer Configuration
liteminer.config.info.common.text: Gameplay settings for vein mining limits, safety checks, harvest cost, and block matching.
liteminer.config.info.client.text: Client settings control local input behavior, on-screen HUD text, and block highlight rendering.
liteminer.config.info.safety.text: These settings decide when vein mining should refuse to continue instead of breaking blocks.
liteminer.config.info.limits.text: Limits keep very large connected structures from being mined all at once.
liteminer.config.info.harvest.text: These settings make larger vein mining actions slower or more expensive instead of free.
liteminer.config.info.matching.text: Matching rules decide whether similar blocks should be treated as part of the selected vein.
liteminer.config.info.controls.text: Choose whether the vein mining key must be held down or toggles the mode on and off.
liteminer.config.info.hud.text: HUD settings control the selected block count and current shape text shown in-game.
liteminer.config.info.highlights.text: Highlights show which blocks will be mined before you break the targeted block.
liteminer.config.key_mode.tooltip: In Hold mode you must keep holding the key to mine. In toggle mode you have to hit the key to toggle.
liteminer.config.key_mode.info: Hold mode is safer for quick mining. Toggle mode is more comfortable for longer vein mining sessions.
liteminer.config.show_hud.tooltip: Enables the text showing how many blocks you have selected and your mining shape.
liteminer.config.show_hud.info: Disable this if you prefer to rely on the selected block highlights without extra HUD text.
liteminer.config.hud_scale.tooltip: Changes how big the HUD elements are.
liteminer.config.hud_scale.info: Values below 1.0 shrink the HUD, while values above 1.0 enlarge it.
liteminer.config.show_highlights.tooltip: Show visual highlights around blocks that will be mined.
liteminer.config.show_highlights.info: Disable this if the outlines are distracting or too expensive on your client.
liteminer.config.block_break_limit.toolt: Upper limit to how many blocks can be broken at a time.
liteminer.config.block_break_limit.info: Higher limits are useful for large ore clusters or tree-like structures, but they make each vein mining action more powerful.
liteminer.config.require_correct_tool_en: If enabled, blocks can only be broken if holding the correct tool.
This stricter check avoids wasting durability or breaking blocks with a tool that is not suited for the selected vein.
liteminer.config.harvest_time_per_block_: Increases the time it takes to break a block when vein mining.
When enabled, Liteminer reduces effective break speed before the first block breaks based on the selection size.
Modifier used to scale up the time it needs to mine a block. Higher values mean longer times to mine.
Higher values make large selections take longer to start mining. This only matters when harvest time scaling is enabled.
liteminer.config.food_exhaustion_enabled: Causes your hunger to go down per block mined.
When enabled, Liteminer applies hunger exhaustion for each block broken by a vein mining action.
liteminer.config.food_exhaustion.tooltip: How much food exhaustion to cause per block broken.
liteminer.config.food_exhaustion.info: Larger values make each mined block consume more hunger. This only matters when food exhaustion is enabled.
liteminer.config.distinguish_grown_crops: If enabled, vein mining crops will only select crops that are grown (or only select crops that are still growing).
Enable this to harvest mature crops without clearing immature crops of the same type.
liteminer.config.match_deepslate_ore_var: If enabled, vein mining will treat <name>_ore and deepslate_<name>_ore as the same block.
Useful around deepslate transition layers where regular and deepslate ore variants appear in the same deposit.
liteminer.config.highlight_foreground_li: Color for the main highlight lines (wool colors).
These lines render normally and are most visible when the selected block face is unobstructed.
liteminer.config.highlight_see_through_l: Color for the see-through highlight lines (wool colors).
These lines render through blocks so selected blocks remain readable behind terrain.
liteminer.config.prevent_tool_breaking.t: Stops vein mining when the durability of the tool gets to 1.
liteminer.config.prevent_tool_breaking.i: Liteminer leaves the tool's final durability point untouched so valuable tools are not destroyed by a large selection.
